diagrams.title: MVD vs FD Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows how Functional Dependency (one-to-one) differs from Multivalued Dependency (one-to-many independent)
elements: Cartesian product of independent multi-valued attributes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the fundamental difference between FD and MVD

diagrams.title: Trivial vs Non-Trivial MVD
diagrams.description: Visual representation of when MVD is trivial or non-trivial using set theory

diagrams.title: 4NF Decomposition Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of decomposing a relation with MVDs into 4NF
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to achieve 4NF through decomposition

diagrams.title: Redundancy in Unnormalized 4NF
diagrams.description: Shows how MVDs create redundant data in relations not in 4NF
elements: STUDENT table with Course and Hobby columns
